brandJourney.bandSubtitle: Our client journey mirrors your growth—from readiness and alignment through redesign to visible capability and sustained performance. The same vocabulary connects Business Enablement and Digital Creations.
brandJourney.pillarPrepareDesc: Align priorities, scope, and readiness—assessment and decision-ready plans before major change.
brandJourney.pillarTransformDesc: Diagnose and redesign what holds you back—strategy, process, and operating model change.
brandJourney.pillarEmergeDesc: Make new clarity and capability visible to your team and your market.
brandJourney.pillarSoarDesc: Execute at scale—milestones, KPIs, launch, and iteration with accountable follow-through.
brandJourney.pillarPrepareIntroConsulting: When you need clarity before commitment: discovery, diagnostics, and decision-ready plans that tell you what to transform first.
brandJourney.pillarTransformIntroConsulting: When traction to scale needs a new foundation: direction and operating model change before people, data, and innovation investments fully pay off.
brandJourney.pillarEmergeIntroConsulting: When execution quality must become visible and measurable: leadership, roles, and decision-ready KPIs surface across the organization.
brandJourney.pillarSoarIntroConsulting: When you are ready to validate and scale what is next: de-risked pilots and phased rollouts with coordinated change across functions.
brandJourney.pillarPrepareIntroDigital: We align on goals, audience, and scope—and validate the approach before full build investment.
brandJourney.pillarTransformIntroDigital: Redesign and build inside the cocoon—implementation sprints with review checkpoints and accountable delivery.
brandJourney.pillarEmergeIntroDigital: Your market-facing presence emerges: credibility, booking paths, and conversion built to represent your brand.
brandJourney.pillarSoarIntroDigital: Purpose-built software and launch discipline: workflows your team runs on, with iteration after go-live.
brandJourney.startHerePrepare: Start here if you need readiness and scope before change.
brandJourney.startHereTransform: Start here if you need operating clarity and redesign.
brandJourney.startHereEmerge: Start here if capability and visibility are the bottleneck.
brandJourney.startHereSoar: Start here if you are ready to validate and scale what is next.
brandJourney.crossLaneBridge: Many clients Prepare with discovery and planning, Transform with Business Enablement, Emerge with a website, and Soar with a platform when the roadmap is clear—one team throughout.
brandJourney.metadataServicesDescription: Business Enablement through Prepare, Transform, Emerge, and Soar—strategic planning, operations, teams, data, innovation, and transformation with accountable implementation.
brandJourney.metadataDigitalDescription: Websites, custom platforms, and workflow automation through Prepare, Transform, Emerge, and Soar—scoped, built, and launched by the team accountable for the outcome.
brandJourney.metadataWorkshopsDescription: Hands-on workshops for branding, sales, productivity, and ideation—facilitated by Roalla so your team leaves with tools they can use immediately.
brandJourney.homeTeaser: Every engagement follows Prepare → Transform → Emerge → Soar—from readiness through visibility to sustained performance.
brandJourney.aboutJourneyDesc: Our butterfly-and-pyramid ethos is not decoration—it is how we structure Business Enablement and Digital Creations. We help you Prepare with clarity and scope, Transform what holds you back, Emerge with visible capability, and Soar with accountable execution.

services.engagementSubtitle: A disciplined four-step model that keeps strategy board-ready and execution accountable.
services.step1: Discovery call to align on goals, constraints, and urgency.
services.step2: Diagnostic sprint to isolate highest-impact priorities.
services.step3: Roadmap and operating plan with owners, milestones, and KPIs.

services.fit1: Need strategic clarity and operating discipline—not just advice
services.fit2: Want owners, milestones, and KPIs tied to business priorities
services.fit3: Prefer a partner who stays through implementation, not a one-off report
services.fitDigitalNote: If you need a website or platform—not Business Enablement first—see Digital Creations. Many clients Prepare with discovery, Transform with Business Enablement, Emerge with a website, and Soar with a platform when the roadmap is clear.
services.faq1Q: Which service should I start with?
services.faq1A: Start with a discovery call—we'll map urgency to the right phase. Many teams begin in Prepare (discovery and strategic planning), then progress through Transform, Emerge, and Soar.
services.faq2Q: How is this different from a big-firm engagement?
services.faq2A: You get senior attention without the overhead. We work in focused sprints with clear deliverables and direct access to the people doing the work.
services.faq3Q: Do you also build websites and platforms?
services.faq3A: Yes. Business Enablement lives on this page; design and build work lives under Digital Creations. One team can do both when it makes sense.
services.faq4A: We review your inquiry personally and respond within one business day with the right entry point and next steps—usually a brief discovery conversation. No obligation to proceed.
services.faq5Q: Is there a cost for the initial conversation?
services.faq5A: No. We review every inquiry at no charge and recommend a path forward before any commercial commitment.
services.typicalEngagementDesc: Focused enablement sprints, often 4–12 weeks depending on scope. Every engagement starts with discovery—we provide a scoped proposal after our initial conversation.
services.heroCase1: Reduced handoff cycle time ~30% for a 40-person operations team.
services.heroCase2: 90-day strategic plan with board-ready KPIs for a growth-stage SaaS company.
services.ctaTitle: Ready to define your next move?
services.ctaSubtitle: Share your priorities and we'll identify the right entry point and a clear, leadership-aligned plan.
services.ctaQualifier: Best fit for growth-stage teams that need strategic clarity, operating discipline, and measurable execution.
services.ctaAssessment: Not sure which service fits? Take our 5-min assessment (secondary option)

services.s0Desc: Develop comprehensive business strategies that align with your vision and market opportunities.
services.s0Ideal: Best when: Leadership needs a clear growth direction, aligned priorities, and a decision framework
services.s0Outcome: A 90-day strategic plan with aligned priorities and measurable milestones.
services.s0NotFor: You only need one-off tactical execution without strategic alignment.
services.s1Desc: Streamline operations and improve efficiency through data-driven process improvements.
services.s1Ideal: Best when: Bottlenecks, handoff delays, or inconsistent delivery are constraining growth momentum
services.s1Outcome: Reduced cycle time, stronger ownership, and smoother operating rhythms.
services.s1NotFor: Your core process already performs reliably with clear ownership.
services.s2Desc: Build high-performing teams through leadership development and organizational design.
services.s2Ideal: Best when: Leadership gaps or team misalignment are limiting execution quality at scale
services.s2Outcome: Sharper role clarity, stronger leadership cadence, and improved cross-team execution.
services.s2NotFor: You only need short-term staffing rather than capability development.
services.s3Desc: Transform your data into actionable insights for better decision-making.
services.s3Ideal: Best when: You have data volume, but decision velocity and clarity remain low
services.s3Outcome: Decision-ready dashboards and KPI systems tied directly to business priorities.
services.s3NotFor: You need data warehousing-only support without decision workflows.
services.s4Desc: Foster a culture of innovation and implement cutting-edge solutions.
services.s4Ideal: Best when: You need to validate new initiatives before committing full capital and team bandwidth
services.s4Outcome: A de-risked pilot roadmap with clear success metrics and adoption paths.
services.s4NotFor: You only need routine optimization of existing mature workflows.
services.s5Desc: Navigate the digital landscape with comprehensive transformation strategies.
services.s5Ideal: Best when: You need coordinated process, technology, and change rollout across functions
services.s5Outcome: A phased transformation plan that improves adoption, alignment, and execution confidence.
services.s5NotFor: You are only replacing a single tool without operational redesign.

digitalBuilds.title: Digital Creations
digitalBuilds.heroJourneyLine: Prepare → Transform → Emerge → Soar — from discovery through production launch.
digitalBuilds.heroProofSubtitle: One accountable team from scope through production.
digitalBuilds.heroOutcome1: Staging links and review checkpoints at each milestone
digitalBuilds.heroOutcome2: Wireframes → staging URL → production launch with a clear checklist
digitalBuilds.heroOutcome3: Iteration after go-live—not a handoff and disappear
digitalBuilds.subtitle: Production-ready websites, custom platforms, and workflow automation—scoped, designed, and delivered by the team accountable for the outcome.
digitalBuilds.proofDesc: Every example is in production — click through to experience the work firsthand.
digitalBuilds.proofTeaserDesc: Two flagship platforms below. Our portfolio page has every live site and platform with filters and case studies.
digitalBuilds.fit1: Need a credible web presence, custom tool, or workflow automation—not just a strategy deck
digitalBuilds.fit2: Want staging links, review checkpoints, and a clear launch plan
digitalBuilds.fit3: Prefer one accountable team from scope through production
digitalBuilds.fitConsultingNote: Not sure whether you need Business Enablement, a website, or a platform first? We help you choose the right phase—many clients Prepare with discovery, Transform with Business Enablement, Emerge with a website, and Soar with a platform when the roadmap is clear.
digitalBuilds.faq1Q: Website or platform—which do I need?
digitalBuilds.faq1A: Marketing sites, booking flows, and brand presence are websites. Dashboards, user roles, and multi-user apps usually mean a custom platform. Connecting tools, automating handoffs, and reducing duplicate entry is workflow automation & integrations—we'll clarify on a short discovery call.
digitalBuilds.faq2Q: How long does a typical build take?
digitalBuilds.faq2A: Marketing sites often land in 1–4 weeks when scope stays tight and approvals move on schedule. MVP platforms typically run 8–16 weeks depending on scope, integrations, and review cycles. Larger sites or bilingual builds may run 4–6 weeks—we confirm in your scoped proposal.
digitalBuilds.faq3Q: Do you maintain the product after launch?
digitalBuilds.faq3A: Yes. We plan for iteration after go-live—fixes, enhancements, and phased features based on real usage, not a handoff and disappear.
digitalBuilds.faq4A: We review your inquiry personally and respond within one business day with a clear delivery plan and next steps—usually a brief discovery conversation. No obligation to proceed.
digitalBuilds.faq5Q: Is there a cost for the initial conversation?
digitalBuilds.faq5A: No. We review every inquiry at no charge and recommend a path forward before any commercial commitment.
digitalBuilds.typicalEngagementDesc: Marketing sites: 1–4 weeks · MVP platforms: 8–16 weeks · Workflow automation: 2–6 weeks (scope-dependent). Most projects start with a scoped proposal after inquiry.

websiteDesign.metadataDescription: Conversion-focused business websites built by an accountable team—not generic templates. Staging reviews, mobile-first design, and launch in as little as 1–4 weeks for focused scopes.
websiteDesign.heroTitle: A business website that earns trust—and converts.
websiteDesign.heroSubtitle: Most teams we talk to are stuck between DIY templates that look generic and agencies that vanish after handoff. We design and build production-ready marketing sites with staging reviews, clear timelines, and one team accountable through launch.
websiteDesign.heroProofSubtitle: Built for owners who need credibility—not another side project.
websiteDesign.heroOutcome1: Mobile-first pages with contact, booking, or lead-capture flows wired and tested
websiteDesign.heroOutcome2: Staging links at each milestone—you approve before anything goes live
websiteDesign.heroOutcome3: SEO-ready structure, metadata, and a launch checklist—not a handoff and disappear
websiteDesign.heroCtaSubtext: ~3 min inquiry · Scoped proposal after a short discovery call · Reply in 1 business day
websiteDesign.heroStatsNote: Focused marketing sites typically ship in 1–4 weeks when content and approvals stay on track.
websiteDesign.marketEyebrow: What we hear in the market
websiteDesign.marketDesc: If you're comparing options right now, you're probably seeing the same patterns we hear every week.
websiteDesign.market1: Template builders (Wix, Squarespace, WordPress themes) that look fine at first but don't reflect your brand or convert visitors into inquiries.
websiteDesign.market2: Agencies that quote vague timelines, hand work to juniors, and disappear once the site is live—leaving you stuck when something breaks.
websiteDesign.market3: DIY sites that fail on mobile, lack proper forms or tracking, or have no SEO foundation when you actually need to be found.
websiteDesign.market4: Rebuilds that drag on for months because nobody owns the outcome, milestones, or go-live checklist.
websiteDesign.marketResolution: Roalla builds marketing sites the way you'd expect a serious partner to: scoped upfront, reviewed on staging, launched with accountability—and supported after go-live when you need iteration.
websiteDesign.offerDesc: Our entry offer for teams that need a credible web presence fast—not a 40-page enterprise project.
websiteDesign.offerIdeal: Best for professional services, growth-stage SMBs, and founders who need a high-trust site with clear paths to contact, book, or request a quote.
websiteDesign.offerI1: Core marketing pages—home, about, services, contact, plus 1–2 priority pages we scope together
websiteDesign.offerI2: Mobile-first responsive layout aligned to your brand and messaging
websiteDesign.offerI3: Contact forms, booking links, or lead-capture flows wired, tested, and connected to your inbox or CRM
websiteDesign.offerI4: SEO-ready page structure, metadata, and a pre-launch checklist
websiteDesign.offerI5: Staging URL at each milestone—you review before production
websiteDesign.offerI6: Post-launch iteration support—not a PDF handoff and goodbye
websiteDesign.offerN1: Large e-commerce catalogs, complex user accounts, or multi-role dashboards (see Custom Platforms)
websiteDesign.offerN2: Professional copywriting, photography, or legal review—we can coordinate or you provide assets
websiteDesign.offerN3: Ongoing SEO campaigns or paid ads management
websiteDesign.offerCtaNote: No cost for the initial review—we reply with a scoped proposal within one business day.
websiteDesign.redesignDesc: Outdated layout, broken mobile experience, or a rebrand that outpaced your current site—we rebuild on a clear timeline with staging reviews.
websiteDesign.conversionDesc: Keep your domain and core content—restructure pages, CTAs, and forms so visitors actually inquire, book, or buy.
websiteDesign.offerFootnote: Need a custom platform, workflow automation, or event landing page on a deadline?
websiteDesign.processDesc: Four focused steps—from scope to live—with checkpoints so you're never guessing what's next.
websiteDesign.process1Desc: Short discovery call to align on audience, pages, timeline, and what success looks like.
websiteDesign.process2Desc: Wireframes or design direction so structure and messaging are approved before full build.
websiteDesign.process3Desc: Development sprints with staging links—you review at each milestone.
websiteDesign.process4Desc: Production go-live with checklist, handoff docs, and iteration support based on real usage.
websiteDesign.workDesc: Every example below is in production—click through to see how they handle mobile, CTAs, and brand trust.
websiteDesign.fit1: Need a credible marketing site—not a complex app with user accounts and dashboards
websiteDesign.fit2: Want staging reviews, clear milestones, and a partner who stays through launch
websiteDesign.fit3: Are comparing DIY templates vs. an agency and want accountable delivery without big-firm overhead
websiteDesign.notFitTitle: Probably not the right page if…
websiteDesign.notFit1: You need a multi-user platform, internal tool, or deep integrations—that's a custom platform build
websiteDesign.notFit2: You only need a one-page event URL on a fixed booth deadline—see Digital Events for fast-turn kits
websiteDesign.notFitNote: We still help you choose the right lane on a short call.
websiteDesign.faq1Q: How is this different from Wix, Squarespace, or a WordPress theme?
websiteDesign.faq1A: Templates get you online quickly, but they rarely match your brand, conversion paths, or technical foundation. We build a site tailored to how you sell and serve—with proper forms, mobile performance, SEO structure, and a team that stays accountable through launch and iteration.
websiteDesign.faq2Q: How long does a business website take?
websiteDesign.faq2A: Focused marketing sites often land in 1–4 weeks when scope stays tight and content approvals move on schedule. Larger sites, heavy custom design, or bilingual builds may run 4–6 weeks. We confirm timeline in your scoped proposal after discovery.
websiteDesign.faq3A: Yes. Many clients come to us with an outdated site, a rebrand, or poor mobile performance. We map what to keep, rebuild on staging, and launch with a clear checklist—select "redesign" when you submit your inquiry.
websiteDesign.faq4Q: Can you build bilingual English and French sites?
websiteDesign.faq4A: Yes. Roalla's own site is bilingual EN/FR. Tell us your language requirements in the inquiry—we scope translation workflow and structure accordingly.
websiteDesign.faq5A: We review your inquiry personally and respond within one business day—usually with a brief discovery call invite and a path to a scoped proposal. No obligation to proceed.
websiteDesign.ctaTitle: Ready for a site you can send prospects to with confidence?
websiteDesign.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your business, timeline, and what a successful launch looks like—we'll reply with scope and next steps.
websiteDesign.ctaQualifier: Best for teams that need a marketing site built properly—not another template they'll outgrow in six months.
websiteDesign.ctaSubtext: ~3 min · No obligation · Scoped proposal after discovery

digitalEvents.metadataDescription: Event landing pages, booth digital kits, and apps for trade shows, investor booths, launches, and dedicated business events—built to support your team on the floor and online.
digitalEvents.title: Digital Events
digitalEvents.subtitle: Apps, pages, and digital capabilities that support your business through trade shows, booths, launches, and dedicated events—
digitalEvents.heroJourneyLine: Prepare → Transform → Emerge → Soar — from event strategy and pages to live engagement and follow-through.
digitalEvents.heroProofSubtitle: Booth-ready digital on fixed deadlines—not generic brochure sites.
digitalEvents.heroOutcome1: QR paths, demo flows, and persona-specific CTAs from the floor
digitalEvents.heroOutcome2: Registration hubs, agendas, and resources for multi-day events
digitalEvents.heroOutcome3: Production-ready pages and apps with the same accountability as Digital Creations
digitalEvents.intro: Roalla builds the digital layer for business events: fast-turn landing pages for booths, microsites for conferences, and apps that help teams capture interest and follow up. Visitors get a clear product story on cellular, actionable next steps on the floor, and follow-up tied to what they engaged with. Whether you need a single URL for a trade show or a full toolkit for a multi-day event, we design and ship with the same accountability as our Digital Creations work.
digitalEvents.catalogTitle: Pages, booth kits, and event apps
digitalEvents.catalogDesc: Mix and match capabilities for trade shows, partner days, product launches, and internal business events.
digitalEvents.topic0Desc: One URL for the floor—product story, demo flow, QR codes or NFC taps, and CTAs that turn foot traffic into conversations and leads.
digitalEvents.topic0Ideal: Best when: You need booth-ready digital before the show opens—not a generic brochure site
digitalEvents.topic0Outcome: A focused landing experience visitors can scan, tap, share, and act on from the booth.
digitalEvents.topic0F1: QR codes and optional NFC taps—multiple entry points so you know which booth moment drove interest
digitalEvents.topic0F2: Step-by-step product demos visitors can finish while your team is with other guests
digitalEvents.topic0F3: Separate next steps for buyers, partners, and press—not one generic form
digitalEvents.topic1Desc: Registration, agendas, speaker bios, and resources for conferences, summits, and dedicated business events.
digitalEvents.topic1Ideal: Best when: Attendees need one trusted place for schedules, updates, and materials
digitalEvents.topic1Outcome: A polished event hub your team can update without rebuilding from scratch.
digitalEvents.topic2Desc: Interactive apps and workflows that support live sessions, stakeholder alignment, and on-site decision-making.
digitalEvents.topic2Ideal: Best when: Your event needs more than a brochure—guided tools, scorecards, or working sessions
digitalEvents.topic2Outcome: Apps your team and attendees actually use during the event—not shelfware.
digitalEvents.topic2F1: Guided workflows (e.g. Business Cocoon for strategy sessions)
digitalEvents.topic2F3: Tools that connect to your broader digital roadmap
digitalEvents.topic3Desc: Fast-turn pages and digital kits for product launches, investor days, partner activations, and sponsor experiences.
digitalEvents.topic3Ideal: Best when: Timeline is tight and the digital experience must match the moment on stage or on the floor
digitalEvents.topic3Outcome: Shipped digital that supports the pitch, demo, and next-step conversations.
digitalEvents.topic3F1: Launch landing pages with clear conversion paths
digitalEvents.appsDesc: Our own apps support strategy sessions, certification planning, and decision-ready workflows—you can use them at events or build something similar for your audience.
digitalEvents.proofDesc: Cold Deja Bru shipped for an investor booth—guided demo flow, QR traffic from the floor, and persona-specific CTAs. See more live work in our Digital Portfolio.
digitalEvents.formatsDesc: Timelines flex from urgent booth builds to full event programs.
digitalEvents.format1Desc: Focused URLs with QR and optional NFC kits when the event date is fixed and the story must be clear on day one.
digitalEvents.format2Desc: Microsites, registration, and resource hubs for conferences and dedicated business events.
digitalEvents.format3Desc: Combine landing pages with interactive tools when your event needs live working sessions or follow-up exports.
digitalEvents.fit1: Have a trade show, launch, or business event with a fixed date and need digital that works on the floor
digitalEvents.fit2: Want pages and apps—not just slides—for demos, QR traffic, and lead capture
digitalEvents.fit3: Need a team that ships production-ready work on event timelines
digitalEvents.fitDigitalNote: Need ongoing websites or custom platforms beyond a single event? Digital Creations covers full build engagements.
digitalEvents.fitPortfolioNote: Want to see more live sites and platforms? Browse our Digital Portfolio.
digitalEvents.faq1Q: How is Digital Events different from Digital Creations?
digitalEvents.faq1A: Digital Events focuses on trade shows, booths, launches, and time-bound business events—often fast-turn pages and event-specific apps. Digital Creations covers broader website and platform builds for ongoing business use. Many clients start with an event and expand into a platform.
digitalEvents.faq2Q: How fast can you ship for a booth or launch?
digitalEvents.faq2A: Urgent booth and launch pages are a core strength—we scope timeline, content, and CTAs in discovery and propose a realistic ship date before any commitment. Cold Deja Bru is an example of a booth-ready page on a tight deadline.
digitalEvents.faq3Q: Can you use Roalla apps at our event?
digitalEvents.faq3A: Yes. Business Cocoon and 4 The Blueprint are live apps you can explore. We also build custom event tools when your workflow needs something tailored.
digitalEvents.faq4Q: Do you handle registration and event microsites?
digitalEvents.faq4A: Yes—agendas, speaker pages, registration flows, and attendee resources for conferences and dedicated business events are part of this service lane.
digitalEvents.faq5Q: What happens after I submit an inquiry?
digitalEvents.faq5A: We review your event date, goals, and digital needs personally and respond within one business day with scope questions and recommended next steps.
digitalEvents.typicalEngagementDesc: Booth / launch pages: 1–3 weeks depending on content readiness · Event microsites: 3–8 weeks · Apps + pages: scoped after discovery. Custom proposals follow your timeline.
digitalEvents.ctaSubtitle: Tell us your date, audience, and what you need on the floor or online—we'll propose pages, apps, and a delivery plan.
digitalEvents.ctaQualifier: Best fit for teams with trade shows, launches, conferences, or dedicated business events on the calendar.

workshops.title: Workshops & Skill Building
workshops.subtitle: Facilitated, practical sessions for teams that want sharper branding, stronger sales habits, better productivity, and structured ideation—not slide decks alone.
workshops.heroJourneyLine: Prepare → Transform → Emerge → Soar — build capability your team can apply the week after the session.
workshops.heroOutcome1: Clear frameworks for branding, sales, or execution
workshops.heroOutcome3: Action plans owners can implement immediately
workshops.intro: Roalla workshops are designed for leaders and teams who learn by doing. Each session blends teaching, facilitated exercises, and concrete next steps you can apply without waiting for a long consulting engagement.
workshops.catalogDesc: Choose a focused session or combine topics into a multi-day program for your team.
workshops.topic0Desc: Clarify how you show up in the market—message, visual cues, and consistency across touchpoints.
workshops.topic0Ideal: Best when: Your offer is strong but your story feels scattered across sales, web, and social
workshops.topic0Outcome: A sharper positioning narrative and practical brand guidelines your team can execute.
workshops.topic0F3: Brand application across sales and digital
workshops.topic1Desc: Build repeatable sales habits—from discovery conversations to follow-through that wins trust.
workshops.topic1Ideal: Best when: Revenue depends on relationships but process and messaging vary by rep
workshops.topic1Outcome: Shared language for discovery, objection handling, and pipeline discipline.
workshops.topic2Desc: Help teams prioritize, reduce friction, and ship work that matches stated goals.
workshops.topic2Ideal: Best when: Busy teams struggle to translate priorities into weekly execution
workshops.topic2Outcome: Clear operating rhythms, prioritization habits, and fewer handoff delays.
workshops.topic2F3: Focus systems that scale beyond the workshop
workshops.topic3Desc: Structured sessions to generate, stress-test, and prioritize ideas before you commit budget.
workshops.topic3Ideal: Best when: You need fresh options but workshops devolve into unstructured brainstorming
workshops.topic3Outcome: A shortlist of vetted ideas with criteria, owners, and next experiments.
workshops.topic3F3: Pilot design with measurable success criteria
workshops.formatsDesc: Formats flex to your team size, location, and goals.
workshops.format1Desc: Focused deep dives on one topic—with exercises, breakout work, and a team action plan.
workshops.format2Desc: Build skills over several weeks with homework, check-ins, and applied practice between sessions.
workshops.format3Desc: Delivered on-site or online with the same facilitated, interactive format.
workshops.fit1: Want your team to practice skills—not only hear about them
workshops.fit2: Need branding, sales, productivity, or ideation uplift without a full consulting sprint
workshops.fit3: Prefer a facilitator who connects workshops to real business enablement
workshops.fitConsultingNote: Need ongoing strategic or operational support beyond a session? Business Enablement engagements provide sustained implementation partnership.
workshops.fitDigitalNote: After sharpening your story or offer, many teams move to Digital Creations for websites and platforms.
workshops.faq1Q: How is this different from Business Enablement consulting?
workshops.faq1A: Workshops are focused, facilitated learning events—often one to several days. Business Enablement is sustained advisory and implementation support over weeks. Many clients start with a workshop, then engage for deeper work.
workshops.faq2A: Yes. We often design multi-day programs—for example, branding plus sales, or productivity plus ideation—based on your team's gaps and timeline.
workshops.faq3A: Most sessions work well from 6 to 30 participants. For larger organizations we can run cohorts or train-the-trainer formats.
workshops.faq4Q: What happens after I submit an inquiry?
workshops.faq4A: We review your request personally and respond within one business day with format options, scope questions, and next steps—usually a brief discovery conversation.
workshops.faq5Q: Is there a cost for the initial conversation?
workshops.faq5A: No. We clarify fit and recommend a format before any commercial commitment.
workshops.typicalEngagementDesc: Single-topic workshops: half-day to full-day · Multi-topic programs: 2–5 days or a weekly series over 4–8 weeks. Custom proposals follow discovery.
workshops.ctaSubtitle: Tell us your team, topics, and timeline—we'll propose a facilitated format that fits.
workshops.ctaQualifier: Best fit for teams that want practical skill building in branding, sales, productivity, or ideation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and how we can help your business.
faq.stillHaveQuestions: Still have questions? We're here to help.
faq.a0: Fractional COO services provide businesses with senior-level operational expertise on a part-time or project basis. This allows companies to access strategic operational leadership without the cost of a full-time COO, making it ideal for growing businesses that need expert operational guidance.
faq.q1: How long does a typical Business Enablement engagement last?
faq.a1: Engagement duration varies based on your needs. Some projects are short-term (1-3 months) for specific initiatives, while others are ongoing partnerships. We work flexibly to match your business requirements and can adjust our involvement as your needs evolve.
faq.a2: We work with businesses across various industries including technology, manufacturing, professional services, retail, healthcare, and more. Our methodologies are adaptable to different business models and sectors.
faq.a3: We take confidentiality seriously. All team members sign non-disclosure agreements, and we follow strict data security protocols. Your business information is treated with the utmost discretion and protected at all times.
faq.q4: What happens after I submit a service inquiry?
faq.a4: We review your submission and respond within one business day with next steps—typically a brief discovery conversation to clarify scope, fit, and timing. There is no obligation to proceed.
faq.q5: Do you work with small businesses?
faq.a5: Absolutely! We work with businesses of all sizes, from startups to established companies. Our services are scalable and tailored to meet the specific needs and budgets of each client, regardless of company size.
faq.q6: How quickly can you start working with us?
faq.a6: We typically can begin engagements within 1-2 weeks of our initial conversation, depending on project scope and our current capacity. For urgent matters, we can often accommodate faster timelines.
faq.q7: What makes Roalla different from other advisory firms?
faq.a7: Our combination of deep financial expertise, strategic business acumen, and hands-on implementation support sets us apart. We don't just provide recommendations—we work alongside you to implement solutions and ensure they deliver real results for your business.

about.title: About Roalla Business Enablement Group
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in business transformation and operational excellence.
about.story1: Roalla was founded on the principle that every business deserves a clear path to success. Our team of experienced consultants is passionate about helping you navigate the complexities of the modern business landscape.
about.story2: We believe in building strong, collaborative partnerships with our clients. Your vision is our mission, and we are dedicated to providing the strategies and support you need to achieve your goals.
about.teamSubtitle: Professional consultants ready to help your business succeed
about.excellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards in everything we do, delivering exceptional results that exceed expectations.
about.integrityDesc: Honest, transparent relationships built on trust and mutual respect with every client we serve.
about.commitmentDesc: Dedicated to your success with unwavering focus and long-term partnership approach.
about.innovationDesc: Cutting-edge strategies and creative solutions to keep you ahead of the competition.
about.missionQuote: To empower businesses and entrepreneurs with strategic insights, innovative solutions, and unwavering support to achieve their full potential and create lasting impact in their industries.
about.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your goals—we'll help you find the right starting point.

assessmentPage.metadataTitle: Business Health Assessment | Roalla Business Enablement Group
assessmentPage.metadataDescription: Five quick questions to find your best starting phase—Prepare, Transform, Emerge, or Soar—and the right Roalla service or lane.
assessmentPage.title: Business Health Assessment
assessmentPage.description: Answer five short questions and we'll suggest your best starting phase, service, or lane—aligned with how we work on our Services page.
assessmentPage.whatHappensNext: ~3 min service inquiry · No obligation · Reply in 1 business day
assessmentPage.faqTitle: How this connects to our services
assessmentPage.faq1Q: How does this relate to Prepare → Transform → Emerge → Soar?
assessmentPage.faq1A: Your lowest-scoring area maps to the phase where teams usually start. Strategy gaps point to Prepare; process and systems gaps to Transform; team and data visibility to Emerge; pilots and scale to Soar.
assessmentPage.faq2Q: What if I need a website or platform instead of consulting?
assessmentPage.faq2A: Question one asks what you're primarily looking for. Choose website, platform, workshop, or event digital and we'll route you to Digital Creations, Workshops, or Digital Events—with a service inquiry pre-filled if you want to talk.
assessmentPage.faq3Q: Is this a replacement for a discovery call?
assessmentPage.faq3A: No—it helps you self-qualify before a conversation. We still review every inquiry personally and recommend the right entry point within one business day.
assessmentPage.faq4Q: What happens after I submit a service inquiry?
assessmentPage.faq4A: Your assessment summary is included when you continue to a service inquiry. We respond within one business day with the right phase, service, and next steps—no obligation to proceed.

lanes.unsure: Not sure yet — we'll help you choose

team.text: How capable is your team and leadership cadence?

scale.hint: Decision-ready KPIs, technology adoption, and de-risked pilots.

options.1: Little data discipline or systems support
options.5: Ready to validate and scale confidently

trustIndicators.title: Why Choose Roalla
trustIndicators.subtitle: Trusted expertise, proven methodologies, and unwavering commitment to your success.
trustIndicators.certifiedDesc: Our team holds industry-recognized certifications and credentials in business enablement and financial management.
trustIndicators.educationDesc: Team members with advanced education in business, finance, operational and strategic management from leading institutions.
trustIndicators.experienceDesc: Decades of combined experience helping businesses achieve their strategic and financial goals.
trustIndicators.confidentialDesc: We maintain the highest standards of confidentiality and data security for all client information.
trustIndicators.areasDesc: Our comprehensive expertise spans multiple domains of business enablement and financial management.

login.oauthErrorAccountNotLinked: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Sign in with email/password or the provider you originally used (e.g. Google).
login.oauthErrorCallback: Sign-in callback failed (often DB/linking). Check Railway logs for [NextAuth] Auth error—set NEXTAUTH_DEBUG=1 for details.
login.oauthErrorMicrosoft: Microsoft or Apple sign-in failed. Check: (1) Redirect URI in Azure/Apple matches your app URL + /api/auth/callback/azure-ad or /api/auth/callback/apple; (2) AUTH_TRUST_HOST=true and NEXTAUTH_URL in Railway. To see the real error: set NEXTAUTH_DEBUG=1 in Railway, retry sign-in, then check Railway logs.
login.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
